task_completion.description: Create the rectangular base plate (60mm x 40mm x 5mm) on the XY plane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A flat rectangular 3D body visible in the FreeCAD viewport, and a 'Pad' feature visible in the Model tree view.

task_completion.description: Create a datum plane angled 45 degrees around the Y-axis relative to the top of the base.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A yellow datum plane visible in the 3D viewport intersecting the base plate at an angle, and a 'DatumPlane' feature in the Model tree view.

task_completion.description: Create the cylindrical mounting boss (20mm diameter, padded 15mm) on the angled plane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cylindrical extrusion extending outward from the angled datum plane in the 3D viewport, and a second 'Pad' feature in the Model tree view.

task_completion.description: Create a 10mm diameter through-hole extending through both the boss and the base.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A visible hole passing completely through the center of the cylindrical boss and exiting out the bottom of the base plate. A 'Pocket' or 'Hole' feature should be visible in the Model tree view.

task_completion.description: Save the project as sensor_mount.FCStd and export the final body as sensor_mount.stl in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title or tab showing 'sensor_mount'. A file manager or terminal window showing both 'sensor_mount.FCStd' and 'sensor_mount.stl' in the /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD GUI to construct the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with FreeCAD menus, toolbars, and dialog boxes (e.g., Pad parameters, Datum Plane parameters) rather than using a terminal script to generate the files.

integrity.description: The agent used the Part Design workbench as instructed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The workbench dropdown menu at the top of the FreeCAD window displays 'Part Design'.

integrity.description: The agent progressively built the model features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Model tree view (Combo View) shows a logical progression of features (Sketches, Pads, DatumPlane, Pocket/Hole) being added over time.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The final model must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/sensor_mount.FCStd and exported as /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/sensor_mount.stl. The FreeCAD tree view should show exactly 2 Pad features (base plate and boss), 1 DatumPlane (for the 45-degree angle), and 1 Pocket or Hole feature (for the through-hole).
